content.speakerText: Hey, I'm swamped with the QA phase—can you help me review the test cases?
content.speakerTextCn: 我QA阶段忙疯了，能帮我审一下测试用例吗？

options.text: Yeah, I can jump in after my 2pm meeting.

content.explanation: 正确答案明确说明了可提供帮助的时间范围（after my 2pm meeting），符合专业沟通原则。选项1虽积极但未考虑自身安排，显得不现实；选项3含糊不清，缺乏责任感；选项4推卸责任，不符合协作精神。

content.speakerText: Do you have access to the new analytics tool?
content.speakerTextCn: 你有新数据分析工具的权限吗？

options.text: I don't know, maybe you should check.
I have it, but I won't share.

content.explanation: 正确答案主动说明当前状态（Not yet）并承诺下一步行动（ping IT），体现责任感。选项1含糊其辞，不符合‘不确定时要主动说明行动’的原则；选项3推卸责任；选项4态度消极，不符合团队协作文化。

content.speakerText: I'm preparing for the client demo and need the latest sales figures. Can you pull those for me?
content.speakerTextCn: 我正在准备客户演示，需要最新的销售数据，你能帮我调取一下吗？

options.text: Sure, I'll send them to you by noon.
I'm not sure where they are.
Why don't you ask the sales team directly?

content.explanation: 正确答案明确承诺完成时间（by noon），体现专业性和协作态度。选项1粗鲁无礼；选项3未提供解决方案；选项4推卸责任。在资源协调场景中，积极回应与明确时间承诺是关键。

content.template: I'd love to, but I'm ______ till Friday.
content.hint: 表达‘抽不开身’的地道说法，常用于职场拒绝请求时
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达（tied up 表示被占用）

content.hint: 职场口语中表示‘快速联系’的非正式动词
content.knowledgePoint: 职场高频动词搭配（ping someone）

content.template: I can ______ in after my meeting.
content.hint: 表达‘介入帮忙’的常用短语，常用于协作场景

content.speakerText: Hey, I'm swamped with the QA phase—can you help me review the test cases?
content.speakerTextCn: 我QA阶段忙疯了，能帮我审一下测试用例吗？
expectedAnswers: Yeah, I can help after my 3pm call.
I'd be happy to—just send me the file and I'll get to it by tomorrow EOD.
I'm currently focused on the sprint review, but I can look at it on Thursday.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确表达是否能提供帮助
语言准确性：语法正确，用词恰当，无中式英语
表达自然度：使用职场口语表达（如 EOD, jump in, send me the file）
关键词覆盖：使用了 help, review, test cases, time frame 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: Do you have access to the new analytics tool?
content.speakerTextCn: 你有新数据分析工具的权限吗？
expectedAnswers: I got access last week—I can share the login details with you.
Not yet, but I'm going to contact IT right away to request it.
I'm not sure, but I'll check my permissions and get back to you by lunch.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：清晰说明权限状态（有/无/不确定）
语言准确性：正确使用 access, request, contact 等动词
表达自然度：使用职场常见表达如 get back to you, right away
关键词覆盖：使用了 access, tool, contact IT, share login 等核心词汇

content.speakerText: I need the budget report for the Q2 review—can you send it over?
content.speakerTextCn: 我需要Q2的预算报告进行复盘，能发我一下吗？
expectedAnswers: Sure, I'll email it to you in the next 10 minutes.
I'm finalizing it now—I'll share it as soon as it's ready.
I don't have it yet, but I'll follow up with Finance and get it to you by noon.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确回应是否能提供资源，或说明下一步行动
语言准确性：使用恰当的动词如 send, share, follow up
表达自然度：符合职场沟通节奏，使用时间承诺（in 10 minutes, by noon）
关键词覆盖：使用了 budget report, send, share, follow up, Finance 等场景关键词
